proof: function[T0](x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool) { not QuotientRelation.constraint[T0](x0) or exists(k0: QuotientRelation[T0]) { QuotientRelation.new[T0](x0) = Option.some[QuotientRelation[T0]](k0) } }[R](ideal_quotient_rel[R](i))
function[T0: CommRing](x0: Ideal[T0]) { Option.some[QuotientRelation[T0]](ideal_quotient_relation[T0](x0)) = QuotientRelation.new[T0](ideal_quotient_rel[T0](x0)) }[R](i)
function[T0: lib(add_comm_group).AddCommGroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { -x0 - -x1 = -(x0 - x1) }[R](a, b)

goal: respects_unary_op[R](ideal_quotient_rel[R](i), R.neg) = forall(x0: R, x1: R) { ideal_quotient_rel(i, x0, x1) implies ideal_quotient_rel(i, -x0, -x1) }
proof: function[T0](x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x1: T0 -> T0) { forall(x2: T0, x3: T0) { not x0(x2, x3) or x0(x1(x2), x1(x3)) } = respects_unary_op[T0](x0, x1) }[R](ideal_quotient_rel[R](i), R.neg)
let w0: R satisfy { exists(k0: R) { ideal_quotient_rel(i, w0, k0) and not ideal_quotient_rel(i, -w0, -k0) } }
let w1: R satisfy { ideal_quotient_rel(i, w0, w1) and not ideal_quotient_rel(i, -w0, -w1) }
let w2: R satisfy { ideal_quotient_rel(i, w0, w2) and not ideal_quotient_rel(i, -w0, -w2) }
function(x0: R, x1: R) { not ideal_quotient_rel(i, x0, x1) or ideal_quotient_rel(i, -x0, -x1) }(w0, w2)
function[T0](x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x1: T0 -> T0, x2: T0, x3: T0) { not respects_unary_op[T0](x0, x1) or not x0(x2, x3) or x0(x1(x2), x1(x3)) }[R](ideal_quotient_rel[R](i), R.neg, a2, b2)
function[T0: lib(add_group).AddGroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 + -x1 = x0 - x1 }[R](a1, a2)
function[T0: lib(add_group).AddGroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 + -x1 = x0 - x1 }[R](b1, b2)

function[T0](x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x1: (T0, T0) -> T0) { forall(x2: T0, x3: T0, x4: T0, x5: T0) { not x0(x2, x3) or not x0(x4, x5) or x0(x1(x2, x4), x1(x3, x5)) } = respects_binary_op[T0](x0, x1) }[R](ideal_quotient_rel[R](i), R.sub)
let w0: R satisfy { exists(k0: R, k1: R, k2: R) { ideal_quotient_rel(i, w0, k0) and ideal_quotient_rel(i, k1, k2) and not ideal_quotient_rel(i, w0 - k1, k0 - k2) } }
let w1: R satisfy { exists(k3: R, k4: R) { ideal_quotient_rel(i, w0, w1) and ideal_quotient_rel(i, k3, k4) and not ideal_quotient_rel(i, w0 - k3, w1 - k4) } }
let w2: R satisfy { exists(k5: R) { ideal_quotient_rel(i, w0, w1) and ideal_quotient_rel(i, w2, k5) and not ideal_quotient_rel(i, w0 - w2, w1 - k5) } }
let w3: R satisfy { ideal_quotient_rel(i, w0, w1) and ideal_quotient_rel(i, w2, w3) and not ideal_quotient_rel(i, w0 - w2, w1 - w3) }
let w4: R satisfy { exists(k6: R, k7: R) { ideal_quotient_rel(i, w0, w4) and ideal_quotient_rel(i, k6, k7) and not ideal_quotient_rel(i, w0 - k6, w4 - k7) } }
let w5: R satisfy { exists(k8: R) { ideal_quotient_rel(i, w0, w4) and ideal_quotient_rel(i, w5, k8) and not ideal_quotient_rel(i, w0 - w5, w4 - k8) } }
let w6: R satisfy { ideal_quotient_rel(i, w0, w4) and ideal_quotient_rel(i, w5, w6) and not ideal_quotient_rel(i, w0 - w5, w4 - w6) }
let w7: R satisfy { exists(k9: R) { ideal_quotient_rel(i, w0, w4) and ideal_quotient_rel(i, w7, k9) and not ideal_quotient_rel(i, w0 - w7, w4 - k9) } }
let w8: R satisfy { ideal_quotient_rel(i, w0, w4) and ideal_quotient_rel(i, w7, w8) and not ideal_quotient_rel(i, w0 - w7, w4 - w8) }
let w9: R satisfy { ideal_quotient_rel(i, w0, w4) and ideal_quotient_rel(i, w7, w9) and not ideal_quotient_rel(i, w0 - w7, w4 - w9) }
function(x0: R, x1: R, x2: R, x3: R) { not ideal_quotient_rel(i, x0, x1) or not ideal_quotient_rel(i, x2, x3) or ideal_quotient_rel(i, x0 - x2, x1 - x3) }(w0, w4, w7, w9)

function[T0](x0: QuotientRelation[T0], x1: T0, x2: T0) { not x0.rel(x1, x2) or quotient_over_mk[T0](x0, x1) = quotient_over_mk[T0](x0, x2) }[R](ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), a1, a2)

function[T0: CommRing](x0: Ideal[T0], x1: T0, x2: T0) { ideal_quotient_relation[T0](x0).rel(x1, x2) = ideal_quotient_rel[T0](x0, x1, x2) }[R](i, b1, b2)

function[T0](x0: QuotientRelation[T0], x1: T0, x2: T0) { not x0.rel(x1, x2) or quotient_over_mk[T0](x0, x1) = quotient_over_mk[T0](x0, x2) }[R](ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), a, b)
function[T0: CommRing](x0: Ideal[T0], x1: T0, x2: T0) { ideal_quotient_relation[T0](x0).rel(x1, x2) = ideal_quotient_rel[T0](x0, x1, x2) }[R](i, a, b)

goal: ideal_quotient_add[R](i, ideal_quotient_add[R](i, quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), a), quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), b)), quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), c)) = ideal_quotient_add[R](i, quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), a + b), quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), c))

goal: ideal_quotient_mul[R](i, quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), a), ideal_quotient_add[R](i, quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), b), quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), c))) = quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), a * (b + c))

ideal_quotient_mul[R](i, ideal_quotient_add[R](i, quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), a), quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), b)), quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), c)) = quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), (a + b) * c)

proof: function[T0: lib(semiring.base).Semiring](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0 * x1 + x2 * x1 = (x0 + x2) * x1 }[R](a, c, b)

goal: quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), (a + b) * c) = quotient_over_mk(ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), a * c + b * c)
